articles.title: XRP Edges To $1: Is Now The Time To Buy?
Justin Drake Proposes Ethereum Beam Chain Upgrade at Devcon 2024
articles.description: Blockchain researcher Justin Drake unveiled the Ethereum Beam Chain concept during Devcon in Bangkok. This proposed overhaul aims to consolidate several key advancements in the network. The proposed Beam Chain will consolidate native support for zero-knowledge proofs and rapid finality into a single upgrade for the Ethereum network. articles.description: StarkWare, the main developer firm behind Starknet, had shared in July that it would introduce a proposal for staking on the blockchain, but had not previously fixed the date of the rollout.

articles.title: Ethereum researcher unveils Beam Chain plan to overhaul consensus layer by 2027
articles.description: Ethereum researcher Justin Drake unveiled a plan to revamp the blockchain's consensus mechanism through an upgrade called "Beam Chain" by 2027, announced during his presentation at Ethereum's Devcon conference in Bangkok.The proposal seeks to modernize Ethereum's consensus layer while maintaining the existing data and execution layers. articles.title: MicroStrategy Makes $2B Bitcoin Investment, Its Biggest Since 2020
articles.description: MicroStrategy has made a $2 billion Bitcoin purchase, its largest since 2020, boosting its holdings as part of a long-term inflation hedge strategy.

articles.title: Ethereum Unveils "Beam Chain" Roadmap at Devcon 7
articles.description: Justin Drake's 'Beam Chain' aims to reduce block times, lower staking requirements, and enhance Ethereum's scalability and post-quantum security.

articles.title: Justin Drake proposes ‘Beam Chain’ to replace Ethereum Beacon Chain
articles.description: Ethereum researcher Justin Drake said that when it comes to staking, the proposal aims to change the requirements from 32 ETH to 1 ETH.

articles.description: The Beam Chain groups a number of big-ticket upgrades, including zero-knowledge support and fast finality, into a single Ethereum upgrade.

articles.title: Bhutan’s Bitcoin Reserves Top $1 Billion
articles.description: Bhutan’s Bitcoin reserves now exceed $1 billion as the nation boosts its holdings through mining, joining a global trend of state-backed crypto assets.

articles.title: Ethereum Could Be Set To Explore New Highs As On-Chain Metrics Light Up
articles.description: On-chain data shows metrics related to network activity have spiked for Ethereum recently, something that could pave way for a further rally. Ethereum Transaction Volume & Whale Transfer Count Have Spiked Recently According to data from the on-chain analytics firm Santiment, Ethereum has seen an uplift in two activity-related metrics.
